title: AI Chat Workspace
description: Khong gian chat de hoi dap, lap ke hoach va luu nhanh y tuong trong trinh duyet.

title: Prompt Studio
description: Trinh bien tap prompt co template, bien dau vao va phien ban mau cho creator.

title: AI Script Generator
description: Tao kich ban video ngan, long-form va voice-over theo tone, nhan vat va cau truc.

title: Content Calendar
description: Lap lich noi dung, gan trang thai va dong bo ke hoach dang bai theo ngay.

title: SEO Brief Builder
description: Tao brief SEO gom title, outline, tu khoa, meta description va FAQ.

title: Social Caption Lab
description: Viet caption cho Facebook, TikTok, YouTube Shorts va Instagram theo nhieu tone.

title: Thumbnail Idea Lab
description: Sinh concept thumbnail, text ngan, mau nen va bo cuc canh cho video.

title: Image Prompt Forge
description: Tao prompt anh AI chi tiet theo phong cach, anh sang, ong kinh va chat lieu.

title: Video Shot Planner
description: Chia kich ban thanh shot list, goc may, chuyen dong, sound cue va ghi chu dung cu.

title: Voiceover Director
description: Huong dan doc voice-over bang nhip, cam xuc, diem nhan va khoang dung.

title: Music Mood Board
description: Goi y mood nhac, tempo, nhac cu va cau truc nen cho video hoac game.

title: Asset Library
description: Thu vien luu anh, prompt, file audio va file du an co tim kiem va tag.

title: Brand Kit
description: Quan ly mau sac, gioi thieu, tone of voice va mau cau chu thuong dung.

title: Landing Page Copy
description: Tao noi dung landing page gom hero, loi ich, bang gia, FAQ va CTA.

title: Offer Builder
description: Dong goi uu dai, bonus, bao hanh va thong diep ban hang thanh mot offer ro rang.

title: CRM Lite
description: Quan ly lead, ghi chu, trang thai cham soc va lich hen khach hang.

title: Invoice Estimator
description: Tinh bao gia va tao noi dung hoa don don gian cho dich vu sang tao.

title: Support Reply Assistant
description: Soan phan hoi khach hang theo tinh huong: hoi gia, bao loi, khieu nai, cam on.

title: Meeting Summarizer
description: Tom tat ghi chu hop thanh y chinh, quyet dinh, action item va rui ro.

title: Task Autopilot
description: Tao, gan va theo doi task tu prompt, co nhac viec va dong bo nhom.

title: Document Cleaner
description: Lam sach van ban, sua format, tao muc luc va bien ghi chu tho thanh tai lieu ro rang.

title: Translation Desk
description: Dich va ban dia hoa noi dung giua tieng Viet, Anh va cac thi truong khac.

title: Research Collector
description: Luu nguon, trich y chinh, tag chu de va tao ban tong hop nghien cuu.

title: Code Snippet Helper
description: Tao, giai thich va bien doi snippet HTML, CSS, JavaScript theo yeu cau.

title: API Tester
description: Luu request API, header, body mau va lich su ket qua kiem thu.

title: Schema Designer
description: Phac thao schema JSON, database table va validation rules cho module moi.

title: Bug Report Writer
description: Bien mo ta loi thanh bug report co buoc tai hien, ky vong, thuc te va muc do uu tien.

title: Release Notes Builder
description: Tao release notes, changelog va thong bao cap nhat tu danh sach thay doi.

title: Learning Path Maker
description: Tao lo trinh hoc theo muc tieu, thoi gian, bai tap va moc kiem tra.

title: Quiz Generator
description: Sinh cau hoi trac nghiem, tu luan, dap an va giai thich tu tai lieu dau vao.

title: Flashcard Builder
description: Tao bo flashcard, luu tien do on tap va lap lich spaced repetition.

title: Lesson Plan Designer
description: Tao giao an voi muc tieu, hoat dong, bai tap va cach danh gia.

title: Knowledge Base
description: Luu bai viet, cau hoi, tag va tim kiem noi bo cho nhom hoac san pham.

title: Automation Builder
description: Tao workflow neu-thi, webhook, lich chay va hanh dong tu dong.

title: Email Campaign Lab
description: Soan chuoi email, phan doan nguoi nhan va gui chien dich co theo doi ket qua.

title: Notification Center
description: Quan ly thong bao trong app, email hoac push theo su kien va muc uu tien.

title: Webhook Inbox
description: Nhan webhook, luu payload, loc su kien va replay request khi can kiem thu.

title: Analytics Dashboard
description: Hien thi luot truy cap, module pho bien, conversion va su kien gan day.

title: User Admin
description: Quan ly tai khoan, quyen truy cap, khoa nguoi dung va nhat ky dang nhap.

title: Billing Admin
description: Theo doi goi su dung, hoa don, thanh toan va gioi han tinh nang.
